title: Google Just Dropped The Singularity Bomb
summary: Google DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis claims humanity may be in the foothills of the singularity as AI agents demonstrate practical utility in coding, research, and scientific discovery. The video argues the critical question has shifted from AI perfection to whether sufficiently useful imperfect AI is already accelerating real-world workflows across multiple domains.
